name: Thai Vegetarian Noodles
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Thai sweet black bean sauce
2 tablespoons Chopped mint leaves, plus 1 sprig mint
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak noodles in 8 cups cold water for 45 minutes. Drain in a colander and set aside.
2. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over high heat. Add garlic and sauté, stirring until lightly browned, about 1 minute.
3. Add broccoli, onions, snow peas, celery, carrots, bell pepper, and mushrooms to the skillet; stir-fry for 1 minute.
4. Stir in peanuts, fish sauce, black bean sauce, vinegar, soy sauce, white pepper, and chopped mint leaves.
5. Add noodles and cook, stirring continuously, until heated through and well mixed, about 2 minutes.
6. Transfer to a platter, sprinkle with bean sprouts and sliced leeks, and garnish with a sprig of mint.
